title: test/apiv2: support netavark
body:
Since netavark does not support dhcp yet we have to create a macvlan
network with a static subnet. Since we do not use the network to run
containers the actual subnet does not matter.

@cevich Thanks, some more tweaks are needed. CNI has predictable network ids (hash of the network name). With netavark they are random so we cannot hardcode them anymore.

/hold cancel
@cevich Can you try again with this version?
Yep np.  [Triggered this one, rebased on this PR](https://cirrus-ci.com/build/6421795048783872)
